briefdescription.para: This function validates input parameters for keymanager.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure that holds the input parameters for Key manager

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if input validation is successful.

inbodydescription.para: Validate at least one output destination is provided.

briefdescription.para: This function validates key metadata fields.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if metadata validation is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function validates key length parameters for a given key.

parameterdescription.para: Length of the key material in bytes.
Type of key to be validated (see XASU_KM_*_KEYTYPE).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if input validation is successful.

inbodydescription.para: Validate key length is either 128-bit or 256-bit for AES.
Validate IV length is non-zero and does not exceed maximum size.
Validate key length is non-zero and does not exceed maximum size for KDF/HMAC.
Validate key length based on compile-time RSA key generation configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function validates that exactly one of KeyCompAddr or KeyId is provided.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the key component structure.
Composite key identifier for vault-based key retrieval.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if exactly one of (KeyCompAddr, KeyId) is non-zero.
XST_FAILURE, if both are zero (no source) or both are non-zero (ambiguous source).

inbodydescription.para: Reject if both are zero (no source) or both are non-zero (ambiguous source).

briefdescription.para: This function validates input parameters for key vault creation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerSubVaultParams structure that holds the input parameters for Key manager.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if input validation is successful.

inbodydescription.para: Validate at least one sub-vault has non-zero capacity.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Keymanager function definitions which are common across client and server.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ss 11/30/25 Initial release
